description: HTTP server: REST API for traits platform with actix-web, CORS, SSE streaming, and keyed interface page routing

features.name: Health endpoint
features.description: GET /health returns healthy status with version

tests.name: health check returns healthy status
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

tests.name: GET /traits returns trait list
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/traits 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

name: Call trait endpoint
description: POST /traits/{path} calls a trait with JSON body

tests.name: POST call to sys.version works
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/traits/sys.version -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"args":[]}' 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

tests.name: GET trait info returns details
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/traits/sys.version 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

tests.name: metrics returns trait count
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/metrics 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

name: Keyed page routing via serve_page
description: Non-API routes resolved via dispatcher.resolve_keyed using kernel.serve [requires]/[bindings]

tests.name: root path serves page from keyed binding
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/ 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

tests.name: unbound path returns 404
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/nonexistent-path-xyz 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$STATUS"

name: Async start entry point
description: start() extracts port from args and delegates to start_server using globals

tests.name: sync serve stub returns error
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; OUT=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/traits/kernel.serve -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"args":[]}' 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$OUT"

name: Default service routing
description: Non-API routes handled by default_service via serve_page instead of returning 404

tests.name: bound path /copy serves page content
tests.command: PORT=18090; ADHOC=0; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || { ./target/release/traits serve -p $PORT &>/dev/null & SPID=$!; ADHOC=1; for i in $(seq 1 20); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 0.2; done; }; STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/copy 2>/dev/null); [ $ADHOC -eq 1 ] && kill $SPID 2>/dev/null; echo "$STATUS"
